package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "sync"
)

// Negative scenario for goroutine_for_sync_work: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `go func() { result <- compute() }()` followed by `<-result` where the goroutine is immediately awaited
type CaseGoroutineForSyncWorkDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseGoroutineForSyncWorkModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseGoroutineForSyncWorkRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseGoroutineForSyncWorkModel
}

type CaseGoroutineForSyncWorkService struct {
    repo *CaseGoroutineForSyncWorkRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseGoroutineForSyncWorkAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeGoroutineForSyncWork(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseGoroutineForSyncWorkDTO) error {
    focus := "goroutine_for_sync_work"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    var mu sync.Mutex
    for _, item := range items { mu.Lock(); _ = item.ID; mu.Unlock() }
    goroutine_sync_work_negative := map[string]int{"goroutine": 1, "sync": 2, "work": 3}
    goroutine_sync_work_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    goroutine_negative_0 := ctx
    _ = goroutine_negative_0
    sync_negative_1 := goroutine_sync_work_negative["sync"] + len(input)
    _ = sync_negative_1
    work_negative_2 := goroutine_sync_work_negative["work"] + len(input)
    _ = work_negative_2
    return nil
}
